title: Build a tiny house
goal: Build a tiny house out of any material you like (dirt, wood, stone, etc.) near where you spawned. FIRST gather enough blocks before you start placing — a small house needs roughly 30 blocks, so collect about 30 first (digging up dirt by hand is the fastest) so you do not run out partway. THEN build: a finished tiny house must fully ENCLOSE a space at least 3x3 on the ground, with walls at least 2 blocks tall on every side AND a roof covering the top (leaving a 1-block doorway is fine). A few blocks on the ground is NOT a house. Only call stop() once the walls AND the roof are actually complete.
rationale: Most open-ended building task (human-reviewed). No fixed material and no milestones — the bot chooses its own approach, gathers blocks, builds a coherent small structure, and decides for itself when it is done. Tests goal interpretation, spatial placement, and self-terminated completion.
review_note: Human-reviewed: judge whether the placed blocks form a small, mostly-enclosed house (walls + a roof) of any material. The scorecard's build summary lists what was placed.
